Employee.GetByDepartmentId: SELECT * FROM Employee WHERE DepartmentID=@DepartmentID AND IsDeleted = FALSE
Employee.GetByPositionId: SELECT * FROM Employee WHERE PositionID=@PositionID AND IsDeleted = FALSE
Employee.Filter: SELECT * FROM Employee WHERE (@DepartmentID IS NULL OR DepartmentID = @DepartmentID) AND (@PositionID IS NULL OR PositionID = @PositionID) AND (@Gender IS NULL OR Gender = @Gender) AND (@SalaryFrom IS NULL OR Salary >= @SalaryFrom)  AND (@SalaryTo IS NULL OR Salary <= @SalaryTo) AND (@HireDateFrom IS NULL OR HireDate >= @HireDateFrom) AND (@HireDateTo IS NULL OR HireDate <= @HireDateTo)
Employee.DeparmentCode: SELECT *FROM employee WHERE DepartmentID IN (SELECT DepartmentID FROM department WHERE DepartmentCode = @DeparmentCode)
CountEmployee.DeparmentCode: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM employee WHERE DepartmentID IN (SELECT DepartmentID FROM department WHERE DepartmentCode = @DeparmentCode)
